name: filesync
tagline: A command-line tool for fast and automated file synchronization
description: FileSync is a CLI-based file synchronization tool for replicating local or remote directories. Built to automate sync tasks with fast operations and minimal configuration. Ideal for use in cron jobs or automated backups.

features.title: File Synchronization
features.description: Sync files between directories on a schedule

features.title: One-Way and Two-Way Sync
features.description: Support unidirectional and bidirectional synchronization modes

features.title: Change Detection
features.description: Detect file changes to keep directories in sync

features.title: Configuration File Support
features.description: Define synchronization rules using configuration files
